title: CVE-2000-0120 — CVSS 7.5 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2000-0120

CVSS Score: 7.5 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2000-01-01T05:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

The Remote Access Service invoke.cfm template in Allaire Spectra 1.0 allows users to bypass authentication via the bAuthenticated parameter.

References: http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/955, https://exchange.xforce.ibmcloud.com/vulnerabilities/4025, http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/955
